args:
set -eu
trace_dir=$(mktemp -d)
trace_path="$trace_dir/verify-fail-closed.trace.fozzy"
fozzy run tests/verify.fail_closed.fozzy.json --det --record "$trace_path" --json >/dev/null
fozzy trace verify "$trace_path" --strict --json >/dev/null
fozzy replay "$trace_path" --json >/dev/null
fozzy ci "$trace_path" --strict --json >/dev/null
printf 'trace-verify-fail-closed\n'
